assessments.rationale: All linear rail applications are constant cross-section by definition. No constraint activation.
Linear guide rails are steel (100Cr6, 42CrMo4, C45). Steel-only constraint matches market requirement. Non-steel rails (ceramic, aluminium) represent <5% niche.
Guide rail production batches typically exceed 100 kg. Standard orders are 500+ kg for repeat geometries.
Repeat geometries from ZOLLERN 300+ die library ship within days. New geometries face 6-12 week die lead - mitigated by die library coverage.
Linear guides operate in controlled industrial environments. Guide rail corrosion protection is downstream (customer applies). Not a constraint for profile supply.
